title: Guidelines for the Implementation of Information Technology by Commercial Banks
summary: Appendix I contains guidelines for Bank IT implementation from introduction to internal IT control and audit.
contains: Chapter VI Electronic System Placement and Transaction Processing
Chapter VII Data Management and Personal Data Protection
Chapter VIII Provision of IT Services by Banks
Chapter IX IT Internal Control and Audit

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of the 'Guidelines for the Implementation of Information Technology by Commercial Banks'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts related to 'Guidelines for the Implementation of Information Technology by Commercial Banks'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Guidelines for the Implementation of Information Technology by Commercial Banks'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Procedures for Submitting Reports and Permit Requests
summary: Appendix II determines the channels and deadlines for RSTI, LRPTI, LKTPTI, IT audits, non-cyber IT incidents, licensing and realization reports.
contains: RSTI end of November before the initial period
LRPTI late November and certain changes
LKTPTI every January 21 of the following year
24-hour initial non-cyber incident notification and 5 business day incident reporting
Permit for system placement, foreign transaction processing, and provision of IT services
Realization of permits and reports no later than 3 months after implementation

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Procedures for Submitting Reports and Permit Requests'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Procedures for Submitting Reports and Permit Requests'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Procedures for Submitting Reports and Permit Requests'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Report and Notification Format
summary: Appendix III contains Formats 3.1, 3.2 and their subformats, Format 3.3, as well as Formats 3.4.1 and 3.4.2.
contains: Report on the Current Condition of IT Implementation
Early Notification of non-cyber IT Incidents

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Report and Notification Formats'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Report and Notification Format'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Report and Notification Format' within the time limit according to the regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Format for Permit Application and Realization Report
summary: Attachment IV contains the format for permit requests and realization reports for placing electronic systems abroad, processing foreign transactions, and providing IT services by the Bank.
contains: Due diligence and risk analysis documents
Agreements, architecture, post-implementation review, and related test results

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of the 'Permit Application Format and Realization Report'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize the 'Permit Request and Realization Report Format'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Format of Application for Permit and Realization Report'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.
